gatewayRequired: The AraInvest gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

welcome.title: AraInvest Research
welcome.askQuestionsDesc: Build a structured pre-market or post-market brief
welcome.askQuestionsPrompt: Build me a market snapshot for today covering major indexes, sector rotation, macro catalysts, and the biggest risk items to watch.
welcome.creativeTasksDesc: Summarize filings, transcripts, and management guidance
welcome.creativeTasksPrompt: Summarize the latest earnings report for my target company, highlight revenue drivers, margin changes, management guidance, and the key bullish and bearish takeaways.
welcome.brainstormingPrompt: Review a swing-trading idea for me: list the setup, catalysts, invalidation level, risk controls, and the questions I still need to answer before taking the trade.

workspace.title: Workspace Files
workspace.previewHint: Pick a file from the tree to open it here.
workspace.previewEmptyDescription: Text, Markdown, HTML, and common image files are supported.
workspace.previewTruncated: This file is large, so only part of it is shown.
workspace.emptyWorkspace: This workspace does not contain any files yet.
workspace.missingWorkspace: The current agent workspace does not exist yet.
workspace.binaryUnsupported: This file type cannot be previewed inline yet.
workspace.imageTooLarge: This image is too large to embed directly.

composer.agentPickerTitle: Route the next message to another agent
composer.heroPlaceholder: How can I help you today?
composer.placeholder: Ask about markets, filings, watchlists, valuation, or strategy ideas...
